note: studio-mac card renders name, tailnet host (100.101.14.32), ONLINE state (green dot), latency (10 ms via ping), agent version (0.5.2), last seen (5s ago). Online/latency/version are the live-bridge fields, supplied by the sandbox stand-in host in lieu of the unreachable Mac.
attic-mini heartbeat is 8m old (past HEARTBEAT_FRESH_MS=30s); the client's isOnline() flips it to OFFLINE (red dot, controls disabled). Stale timestamp is seeded/sim-controlled.

Verb chips (exec.run, fs.read, fs.write, fs.list, process.spawn, process.send_input, process.resize, process.kill) plus the invocation-log table (WHEN/VERB/CALLER/MS/RESULT) render on the card, including a red failed row (exec.run kanban-loop, RPC timeout). Log read from the seeded ~/.garrison/outposts/log/<day>.jsonl.

Pair-a-new-Mac flow mints a token and surfaces the one-line installer: curl -fsSL http://<host>/install.sh | GARRISON_HOST=... GARRISON_TOKEN=... GARRISON_MACHINE=loft-mac bash. Installer shown in the panel; not run.
SSH provisioning entry point renders: tailnet-host input, ssh-user input, Provision button, and the 'Output streams live below' hint (streamed-steps area). Not provisioned.
